title: Senior Financial Analyst - Union Bank of India - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Union Bank of India - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Union Bank of India! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Kochi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Union Bank of India:
Union Bank of India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Union Bank of India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
